vehicles.name: Corp Security Car
vehicles.desc: An armoured sedan in corporate livery, carrying a two-person security team and surveillance equipment. She patrols corporate zones and calls in the heavy response.
vehicles.notes: Pre-built security car for immediate cyberpunk patrol encounters. The first rung of corporate opposition.

vehicles.name: Delivery Drone (Armed)
vehicles.desc: A cargo drone modified with a concealed weapon mount. She delivers packages to the front door and bullets to anyone who interferes.
vehicles.notes: Pre-built armed drone for immediate cyberpunk aerial encounters. She looks civilian until she doesn't.

vehicles.name: Netrunner Bike
vehicles.desc: An electric motorcycle with a mobile hacking rig integrated into the frame. She carries the netrunner to within range of the target network and gets them out when the ICE bites back.
vehicles.notes: Pre-built netrunner bike for immediate cyberpunk infiltration. The hacker's preferred ride — silent, fast, and connected.
